visualization.title: Data Visualization
welcome.title: Welcome to the Clinician Virtual Assistant
welcome.description:
A brief introduction to get you started. 
 The cVA is able to generate graphs based on your hospitals metrics.

if it is your first time, we suggest you ask the CVA for a guided visualization, this will have the CVA go through the process step by step.

Or go ahead and ask it to make you a graph of any of any kpi in the RES-Qdatabase. You can ask for filters or specific periods of time in your initial query or ask the CVA to apply filters to your graph after its been made.
